name: MiniSearch
description: Minimalist web-searching platform with an AI assistant that runs directly from your browser. Uses WebLLM, Wllama and SearXNG. Demo: https://felladrin-minisearch.hf.space

commit.message: Give a unique ID to each log entry, to help rendering them on the Logs Modal
Improve search functionality and UI components
Update husky's pre-commit command to re-stage files after updating them

Remove unnecessary dependencies from knip ignore list

- Remove @mantine/code-highlight, country-flag-icons, react-markdown, rehype-external-links, remark-gfm, and shiki from ignoreDependencies
- These dependencies are actually used in the codebase and properly detected by knip
- Fixes knip configuration hints that appeared during linting
- Only keep postcss, postcss-preset-mantine, postcss-simple-vars, and globals which are build tools/type definitions

commit.message:
Update dependency @biomejs/biome to v2.4.5 (#1785)

* Update dependency @biomejs/biome to v2.4.5

* Fix Biome 2.x linting: use node: protocol for builtin modules

- Update fs require to use node:fs protocol
- Update path require to use node:path protocol
- Resolves linting errors introduced by Biome 2.x upgrade

* Fix Biome 2.x linting: avoid using array indices as React keys

- Replace array index with content hash in MessageList.tsx
- Remove array index from LogEntry key in LogsModal.tsx
- Resolves noArrayIndexKey linting errors from Biome 2.x upgrade

---------

Co-authored-by: renovate[bot] <29139614+renovate[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Victor Nogueira <felladrin@gmail.com>

verification.payload:
tree 88fb9d26a07fbc18b243609cc09e1f166a8a8841
parent 8f9e19356369b9d83a50f13f37eaa44937a0bced
author renovate[bot] <29139614+renovate[bot]@users.noreply.github.com> 1772530138 +0100
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1772530138 +0100

Update dependency @biomejs/biome to v2.4.5 (#1785)

* Update dependency @biomejs/biome to v2.4.5

* Fix Biome 2.x linting: use node: protocol for builtin modules

- Update fs require to use node:fs protocol
- Update path require to use node:path protocol
- Resolves linting errors introduced by Biome 2.x upgrade

* Fix Biome 2.x linting: avoid using array indices as React keys

- Replace array index with content hash in MessageList.tsx
- Remove array index from LogEntry key in LogsModal.tsx
- Resolves noArrayIndexKey linting errors from Biome 2.x upgrade

---------

Co-authored-by: renovate[bot] <29139614+renovate[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Victor Nogueira <felladrin@gmail.com>

readme_html:
MiniSearch

A minimalist web-searching app with an AI assistant that runs directly from your browser.

Live demo: https://felladrin-minisearch.hf.space

Screenshot

Features

  • Privacy-focused: No tracking, no ads, no data collection
  • Easy to use: Minimalist yet intuitive interface for all users
  • Cross-platform: Models run inside the browser, both on desktop and mobile
  • Integrated: Search from the browser address bar by setting it as the default search engine
  • Efficient: Models are loaded and cached only when needed
  • Customizable: Tweakable settings for search results and text generation
  • Open-source: The code is available for inspection and contribution at GitHub

Prerequisites

  • Docker

Getting started

Here are the easiest ways to get started with MiniSearch. Pick the one that suits you best.

Option 1 - Use MiniSearch's Docker Image by running in your terminal:

docker run -p 7860:7860 ghcr.io/felladrin/minisearch:main

Option 2 - Add MiniSearch's Docker Image to your existing Docker Compose file:

services:
  minisearch:
    image: ghcr.io/felladrin/minisearch:main
    ports:
      - "7860:7860"

Option 3 - Build from source by downloading the repository files and running:

docker compose -f docker-compose.production.yml up --build

Once the container is running, open http://localhost:7860 in your browser and start searching!

Frequently asked questions
